target_host.role: shared Lemmata VPS intended for bounded Delta public alpha

lemmata_latency_baseline.method: 20 sequential HTTPS health requests from the operator workstation

command: Read-only P014 target-host SSH inventory and fail-closed gate; then 20 sequential system-curl HTTPS health latency samples against https://lda.lemmata.app/_stcore/health (full content-free command transcript retained in provenance/evidence/P014/target-host-read-only-preflight.md)

replay.working_directory: Operator workstation plus the mutable target host observed through a read-only SSH session
replay.command: Read-only P014 target-host SSH inventory and fail-closed gate; then 20 sequential system-curl HTTPS health latency samples against https://lda.lemmata.app/_stcore/health (full content-free command transcript retained in provenance/evidence/P014/target-host-read-only-preflight.md)
limitations: The target host and public network are mutable, so later observations may differ even when the same command set is used.
The SSH credential and its local path are deliberately not retained; replay requires separately authorised host access.
The inventory records selected safe service properties and a Caddyfile hash, not environment values, process command lines, credentials, or configuration contents.
Twenty sequential health requests are a pre-change operational reference, not a concurrency test, benchmark, or service-level objective.

The gate stopped before installing a container runtime, creating swap, pulling an image, installing Delta, changing Caddy or DNS, or running coexistence, restart, rollback, and owner-acceptance tests.

notes: The target host remained unchanged and Lemmata stayed healthy, but the preflight correctly failed closed because no supported container runtime exists. The no-swap, uncapped-Lemmata, approximately 4 GiB host profile also leaves capacity acceptance unresolved. P014-AC-08 remains pending and no public activation is authorised.
